## v0.1.11 â€” Color themes & updater reliability

**New**
- IDE-style color themes â€” Dracula, Catppuccin, Nord, One Dark, Tokyo Night, GitHub, Gruvbox, Monokai, Solarized, and more
- Dedicated Appearance settings section with live theme preview swatches
- Shared theme tokens power panels, text, accents, and controls across the entire interface

**Changed**
- Theme picker moved from System to the new Appearance section
- Launch at startup is enabled by default for new installs
- Sound feedback uses softer sweep chimes instead of plain sine tones
- Push-to-talk release detection is more responsive with faster key polling
- Update checks read the release feed directly so prompts still appear when the built-in updater plugin cannot parse latest.json
- Legacy dark/light/system theme preferences migrate automatically to the new theme IDs

**Fixed**
- Hotkey capture restores global shortcuts reliably after cancel or reassignment
- Update prompts appear even when the Tauri updater plugin fails but the feed is reachable
- Settings and other loading states use a consistent compact loading indicator
